chapter_title.en: Chapter 106 – The severity of the afflictions of the Momin

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/329)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/329)

parts.text: مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ بُهْلُولِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ الْعَبْدِيِّ

text: إِنَّمَا الْمُؤْمِنُ بِمَنْزِلَةِ كِفَّةِ الْمِيزَانِ كُلَّمَا زِيدَ فِي إِيمَانِهِ زِيدَ فِي بَلَائِهِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from one of his companions, from Muhammad Bin Al Musanna Al Hazramy, from Muhammad Bin Bahloul Bin Muslim Al Abdy,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘But rather, the Momin is at the status of the hand of the scale. Every time his Emān increases, there is an increase in his afflictions’.
en.sarwar: 10. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu‘Abd Allah from certain individuals of his people from Muhammad ibn al-Muthanna al-Hazrami from Muhammad ibn Bahlul ibn Muslim al-‘Abdi from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The believers are like the two sides of a balance, as his belief increases in strength, his trial also increases in intensity.”
